TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Du Aimin Simpu == Du Aimin Simpu (France: Antoine Duris, 1909 miheca-1995miheca 3 folad), o nano Paris Wayfang Tintokay a Simpu, halafin itira i Bahuan (Mayuan) niyaro' no Iwatan i Kalingko, mikapot mikinkiw to no'Amis ato Iwatan a sowal. Rayray no 'orip Ci Du Aimin Simpu i Guizhou, Sichuan, Yunnan no Congko mipatenak . Talacowa caay ko sakasasowalan ko nifana'an, nika itira cingra i Huangguoshu a mipatenak i, mitilid to no pidafohan to sowal no Buyian . Mapatireng ko kitakit no Conghuarenmin kapolongan itiya, halo cingra ato roma Paris Wayfang Tintokay tayni Taywan niyaro' no yincumin mipatenak . Saka ira ko salongan 40 mihecaan ni Du Aimin Simpu i Bahuan (Mayuan) niyaro' no Iwatan i Kalingko , kaitini ningra i Taywan kinatolo minokay taywa i France kitakit . I 1984 mihecaan, o pikowan KMT pako "Ira ko papinapina tamdaw o sowal no Finacadan ato Loma tilid ko sapitinto, matoira ko tatiihay faloco' no demak, orasaka o fafooten, tamadawen, kao kowaping a sowal ko sapitinto, macara ko picikeroh to kowaping a kiwiko" saan. O pifadesan no sifo itiya, mifo'ot to no Loma a ngiha pasowal ato pasifana' itiya, onano Kalingko ato Posong sa'etal a mala foksiay mala Simpuay oya to ono finacadan ko pasifana' to Loma tilid, halafin caay pikihar to no sifo a demak . Misafaloco' ci Du Aimin Simpu a mikinkiw to no'Amis ato Iwatan a sowal, masongila' ko kasa niyaro'ay a sowal, ato pakafana' to lalosidan misaheci, tinako faloay sowal no kasa'etal sasiroma sowal no 'odal . Itini i pidafo'an to sowal no 'Amis, malo kanga'ayan no romaroma simpu, nawhani adihay ko pacecay no sowal, kanga'ayan no minanamay, kacango'otan ono France ko pihangiha', caay ka ranikay ko tamdaw nilayap . I 1990 miheca, mirina haca cingra to no France 'Amisan a pidafo'an sowal . Ilaloma' no kiwkay, sa'icel sa cingra to sowal no 'Amis, nika ma'osi ko kaemangay to sowal no ina a miliyas to kiwkay . Mararid ci Du Aimin Simpu pasadak i Paris Wayfan tintikay tilidan, pasadak to lekakawa, ponka no Iwatan (Bunun) a tilid, roma kitakit pikingkiw to no finacadan sowal a hakasi, alatayrayra sa i kiwkay no Tinsokiw i Pailasen no Kohkoh milicay i cvingraan . Oya a pidafo'an to sowal no Iwatan, malakilac to kasacecay Simpu, manga'ay sapinengneng midafo', nawhani nai Bahuan ko pialaan, ato no Posong, Nanto a kasasitiwtiwan . Matiya ono Paylenkay ci Ciyaste Simpu, o Iwatan (Bunun) a sowal o nai Taoyin no Takao sakaira . I 1990 miheca, ira ko milicayay, 81 ko mihecaan ni Du Aimin Simpu oyaan to 8 widi ko pinangan no 'orip, itira i Pailasen tinsokiwkay a matelangay fadahong, itira mitisil to pidafo'an mikawit, milicay to nafaloco'an to saki 'Amis, Iwatan a pidafo'an a sowal, sa cisowal sa cingra, ci romi'ad to ko mato'asay . I 1994 miheca 5 folad 20 romi'ad, Kiwikopo pakaolah cingraan to mikinkiwan to saowal no finacadan a padafoh, ci Du Aimin Simpu mapatodong to payso no Taywan 10 'ofad payso . Toya folad, malalisan cingra saka minokay tayra i France paising, saka tosa miheca 3 folad pinakay ningra tayra i France ko patay . Midotocay to pikerid ni Du Aimin Simpu to Misa ano eca pakimad i, saheto sa ono kowapin ko sakasasowal, tangsol sa patiko tayra i salongan 70 a kaemangay a salikaka . I 2001 miheca 11 folad 7 romi'ad, France hakasiyin o France Congko ponka mipakaolah to Kalingko Paris Wayfan tintokay, todong piahowid ci Du Aimin, Mo Deming, Yu Guangfa, Mu Dequan, Liu Yifeng, Pei De, Bo Liya, Pan Shiguang Simpuan to pikawit to sowal no 'Amis, Iwatan (Bunun) finacadan a nikatadamaan to tilid padafo'an to sowal a mikawit .
S.PHON: == ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u == ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u (franʦə: anto~uinə ɬ~ɮo~u~uris, **** miħəʦa-****miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ), o~u nano~u paris wajfaŋ tinto~ukaj a simpo~u~u, ħaɾafin itira i b~b~vaħo~u~uan (majo~u~uan) nijaro~uʡ no~u iwatan i kaɾiŋko~u, mikapo~ut mikinkiw to~u no~uʡamis ato~u iwatan a so~uwaɾ. rajraj no~u ʡo~urip ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u i *o~u~ui*ħo~uo~u~u, siʦħo~u~uan, jo~u~unnan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u mipatənak . taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ko~u sakasaso~uwaɾan ko~u nifanaʡan, nika itira ʦiŋra i ħo~u~uaŋ*o~u~uo~usħo~u~u a mipatənak i, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u piɬ~ɮafo~uħan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u b~b~vo~u~ujian . mapatirəŋ ko~u kitakit no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uarənmin kapo~uɾo~uŋan itija, ħaɾo~u ʦiŋra ato~u ro~uma paris wajfaŋ tinto~ukaj tajni tajwan nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin mipatənak . saka ira ko~u saɾo~uŋan ** miħəʦaan ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u i b~b~vaħo~u~uan (majo~u~uan) nijaro~uʡ no~u iwatan i kaɾiŋko~u , kaitini niŋra i tajwan kinato~uɾo~u mino~ukaj tajwa i franʦə kitakit . i **** miħəʦaan, o~u piko~uwan kmt pako~u "ira ko~u papinapina tamɬ~ɮaw o~u so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u sapitinto~u, mato~uira ko~u tatiiħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, o~urasaka o~u fafo~uo~utən, tamaɬ~ɮawən, kao~u ko~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ ko~u sapitinto~u, maʦara ko~u piʦikəro~uħ to~u ko~uwapiŋ a kiwiko~u" saan. o~u pifaɬ~ɮəsan no~u sifo~u itija, mifo~uʡo~ut to~u no~u ɾo~uma a ŋiħa paso~uwaɾ ato~u pasifanaʡ itija, o~unano~u kaɾiŋko~u ato~u po~uso~uŋ saʡətaɾ a maɾa fo~uksiaj maɾa simpo~u~uaj o~uja to~u o~uno~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u pasifanaʡ to~u ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ħaɾafin ʦaaj pikiħar to~u no~u sifo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak . misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u a mikinkiw to~u no~uʡamis ato~u iwatan a so~uwaɾ, maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u kasa nijaro~uʡaj a so~uwaɾ, ato~u pakafanaʡ to~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan misaħəʦi, tinako~u faɾo~uaj so~uwaɾ no~u kasaʡətaɾ sasiro~uma so~uwaɾ no~u ʡo~uɬ~ɮaɾ . itini i piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, maɾo~u kaŋaʡajan no~u ro~umaro~uma simpo~u~u, nawħani aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u paʦəʦaj no~u so~uwaɾ, kaŋaʡajan no~u minanamaj, kaʦaŋo~uʡo~utan o~uno~u franʦə ko~u piħaŋiħaʡ, ʦaaj ka ranikaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw niɾajap . i **** miħəʦa, mirina ħaʦa ʦiŋra to~u no~u franʦə ʡamisan a piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan so~uwaɾ . iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u kiwkaj, saʡiʦəɾ sa ʦiŋra to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, nika maʡo~usi ko~u kaəmaŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina a miɾijas to~u kiwkaj . marariɬ~ɮ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u pasaɬ~ɮak i paris wajfan tintikaj tiɾiɬ~ɮan, pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ɾəkakawa, po~unka no~u iwatan (b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ro~uma kitakit pikiŋkiw to~u no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan so~uwaɾ a ħakasi, aɾatajrajra sa i kiwkaj no~u tinso~ukiw i paiɾasən no~u ko~uħko~uħ miɾiʦaj i ʦb~viŋraan . o~uja a piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u iwatan, maɾakiɾaʦ to~u kasaʦəʦaj simpo~u~u, maŋaʡaj sapinəŋnəŋ miɬ~ɮafo~uʡ, nawħani nai b~b~vaħo~u~uan ko~u piaɾaan, ato~u no~u po~uso~uŋ, nanto~u a kasasitiwtiwan . matija o~uno~u pajɾənkaj ʦi ʦijastə simpo~u~u, o~u iwatan (b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) a so~uwaɾ o~u nai tao~ujin no~u takao~u sakaira . i **** miħəʦa, ira ko~u miɾiʦajaj, ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u o~ujaan to~u * wiɬ~ɮi ko~u pinaŋan no~u ʡo~urip, itira i paiɾasən tinso~ukiwkaj a matəɾaŋaj faɬ~ɮaħo~uŋ, itira mitisiɾ to~u piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan mikawit, miɾiʦaj to~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan to~u saki ʡamis, iwatan a piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan a so~uwaɾ, sa ʦiso~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra, ʦi ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u mato~uʡasaj . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kiwiko~upo~u pakao~uɾaħ ʦiŋraan to~u mikinkiwan to~u sao~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a paɬ~ɮafo~uħ, ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u pajso~u no~u tajwan ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ pajso~u . to~uja fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maɾaɾisan ʦiŋra saka mino~ukaj tajra i franʦə paisiŋ, saka to~usa miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ pinakaj niŋra tajra i franʦə ko~u pataj . miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u pikəriɬ~ɮ ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u to~u misa ano~u əʦa pakimaɬ~ɮ i, saħəto~u sa o~uno~u ko~uwapin ko~u sakasaso~uwaɾ, taŋso~uɾ sa patiko~u tajra i saɾo~uŋan ** a kaəmaŋaj a saɾikaka . i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, franʦə ħakasijin o~u franʦə ʦo~uŋko~u po~unka mipakao~uɾaħ to~u kaɾiŋko~u paris wajfan tinto~ukaj, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin, mo~u ɬ~ɮəmiŋ, jo~u~u *o~u~uaŋfa, mo~u~u ɬ~ɮə*o~u~uan, ɾio~u~u jifəŋ, pəi ɬ~ɮə, b~b~vo~u ɾija, pan sħi*o~u~uaŋ simpo~u~uan to~u pikawit to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, iwatan (b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) finaʦaɬ~ɮan a nikataɬ~ɮamaan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮafo~uʡan to~u so~uwaɾ a mikawit .
S.FORM: == Du Aimin Simpu == Du Aimin Simpu (France: Antoine Duris, 1909 miheca-1995miheca 3 folad), o nano Paris Wayfang Tintokay a Simpu, halafin itira i Bahuan (Mayuan) niyaro' no Iwatan i Kalingko, mikapot mikinkiw to no'Amis ato Iwatan a sowal. Rayray no 'orip Ci Du Aimin Simpu i Guizhou, Sichuan, Yunnan no Congko mipatenak . Talacowa caay ko sakasasowalan ko nifana'an, nika itira cingra i Huangguoshu a mipatenak i, mitilid to no pidafohan to sowal no Buyian . Mapatireng ko kitakit no Conghuarenmin kapolongan itiya, halo cingra ato roma Paris Wayfang Tintokay tayni Taywan niyaro' no yincumin mipatenak . Saka ira ko salongan 40 mihecaan ni Du Aimin Simpu i Bahuan (Mayuan) niyaro' no Iwatan i Kalingko , kaitini ningra i Taywan kinatolo minokay taywa i France kitakit . I 1984 mihecaan, o pikowan KMT pako "Ira ko papinapina tamdaw o sowal no Finacadan ato Loma tilid ko sapitinto, matoira ko tatiihay faloco' no demak, orasaka o fafooten, tamadawen, kao kowaping a sowal ko sapitinto, macara ko picikeroh to kowaping a kiwiko" saan. O pifadesan no sifo itiya, mifo'ot to no Loma a ngiha pasowal ato pasifana' itiya, onano Kalingko ato Posong sa'etal a mala foksiay mala Simpuay oya to ono finacadan ko pasifana' to Loma tilid, halafin caay pikihar to no sifo a demak . Misafaloco' ci Du Aimin Simpu a mikinkiw to no'Amis ato Iwatan a sowal, masongila' ko kasa niyaro'ay a sowal, ato pakafana' to lalosidan misaheci, tinako faloay sowal no kasa'etal sasiroma sowal no 'odal . Itini i pidafo'an to sowal no 'Amis, malo kanga'ayan no romaroma simpu, nawhani adihay ko pacecay no sowal, kanga'ayan no minanamay, kacango'otan ono France ko pihangiha', caay ka ranikay ko tamdaw nilayap . I 1990 miheca, mirina haca cingra to no France 'Amisan a pidafo'an sowal . Ilaloma' no kiwkay, sa'icel sa cingra to sowal no 'Amis, nika ma'osi ko kaemangay to sowal no ina a miliyas to kiwkay . Mararid ci Du Aimin Simpu pasadak i Paris Wayfan tintikay tilidan, pasadak to lekakawa, ponka no Iwatan (Bunun) a tilid, roma kitakit pikingkiw to no finacadan sowal a hakasi, alatayrayra sa i kiwkay no Tinsokiw i Pailasen no Kohkoh milicay i cvingraan . Oya a pidafo'an to sowal no Iwatan, malakilac to kasacecay Simpu, manga'ay sapinengneng midafo', nawhani nai Bahuan ko pialaan, ato no Posong, Nanto a kasasitiwtiwan . Matiya ono Paylenkay ci Ciyaste Simpu, o Iwatan (Bunun) a sowal o nai Taoyin no Takao sakaira . I 1990 miheca, ira ko milicayay, 81 ko mihecaan ni Du Aimin Simpu oyaan to 8 widi ko pinangan no 'orip, itira i Pailasen tinsokiwkay a matelangay fadahong, itira mitisil to pidafo'an mikawit, milicay to nafaloco'an to saki 'Amis, Iwatan a pidafo'an a sowal, sa cisowal sa cingra, ci romi'ad to ko mato'asay . I 1994 miheca 5 folad 20 romi'ad, Kiwikopo pakaolah cingraan to mikinkiwan to saowal no finacadan a padafoh, ci Du Aimin Simpu mapatodong to payso no Taywan 10 'ofad payso . Toya folad, malalisan cingra saka minokay tayra i France paising, saka tosa miheca 3 folad pinakay ningra tayra i France ko patay . Midotocay to pikerid ni Du Aimin Simpu to Misa ano eca pakimad i, saheto sa ono kowapin ko sakasasowal, tangsol sa patiko tayra i salongan 70 a kaemangay a salikaka . I 2001 miheca 11 folad 7 romi'ad, France hakasiyin o France Congko ponka mipakaolah to Kalingko Paris Wayfan tintokay, todong piahowid ci Du Aimin, Mo Deming, Yu Guangfa, Mu Dequan, Liu Yifeng, Pei De, Bo Liya, Pan Shiguang Simpuan to pikawit to sowal no 'Amis, Iwatan (Bunun) finacadan a nikatadamaan to tilid padafo'an to sowal a mikawit .
S.PHON: == ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u == ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u (franʦə: anto~uinə ɬ~ɮo~u~uris, **** miħəʦa-****miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ), o~u nano~u paris wajfaŋ tinto~ukaj a simpo~u~u, ħaɾafin itira i b~b~vaħo~u~uan (majo~u~uan) nijaro~uʡ no~u iwatan i kaɾiŋko~u, mikapo~ut mikinkiw to~u no~uʡamis ato~u iwatan a so~uwaɾ. rajraj no~u ʡo~urip ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u i *o~u~ui*ħo~uo~u~u, siʦħo~u~uan, jo~u~unnan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u mipatənak . taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ko~u sakasaso~uwaɾan ko~u nifanaʡan, nika itira ʦiŋra i ħo~u~uaŋ*o~u~uo~usħo~u~u a mipatənak i, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u piɬ~ɮafo~uħan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u b~b~vo~u~ujian . mapatirəŋ ko~u kitakit no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uarənmin kapo~uɾo~uŋan itija, ħaɾo~u ʦiŋra ato~u ro~uma paris wajfaŋ tinto~ukaj tajni tajwan nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin mipatənak . saka ira ko~u saɾo~uŋan ** miħəʦaan ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u i b~b~vaħo~u~uan (majo~u~uan) nijaro~uʡ no~u iwatan i kaɾiŋko~u , kaitini niŋra i tajwan kinato~uɾo~u mino~ukaj tajwa i franʦə kitakit . i **** miħəʦaan, o~u piko~uwan kmt pako~u "ira ko~u papinapina tamɬ~ɮaw o~u so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u sapitinto~u, mato~uira ko~u tatiiħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, o~urasaka o~u fafo~uo~utən, tamaɬ~ɮawən, kao~u ko~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ ko~u sapitinto~u, maʦara ko~u piʦikəro~uħ to~u ko~uwapiŋ a kiwiko~u" saan. o~u pifaɬ~ɮəsan no~u sifo~u itija, mifo~uʡo~ut to~u no~u ɾo~uma a ŋiħa paso~uwaɾ ato~u pasifanaʡ itija, o~unano~u kaɾiŋko~u ato~u po~uso~uŋ saʡətaɾ a maɾa fo~uksiaj maɾa simpo~u~uaj o~uja to~u o~uno~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u pasifanaʡ to~u ɾo~uma tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ħaɾafin ʦaaj pikiħar to~u no~u sifo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak . misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u a mikinkiw to~u no~uʡamis ato~u iwatan a so~uwaɾ, maso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u kasa nijaro~uʡaj a so~uwaɾ, ato~u pakafanaʡ to~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan misaħəʦi, tinako~u faɾo~uaj so~uwaɾ no~u kasaʡətaɾ sasiro~uma so~uwaɾ no~u ʡo~uɬ~ɮaɾ . itini i piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, maɾo~u kaŋaʡajan no~u ro~umaro~uma simpo~u~u, nawħani aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u paʦəʦaj no~u so~uwaɾ, kaŋaʡajan no~u minanamaj, kaʦaŋo~uʡo~utan o~uno~u franʦə ko~u piħaŋiħaʡ, ʦaaj ka ranikaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw niɾajap . i **** miħəʦa, mirina ħaʦa ʦiŋra to~u no~u franʦə ʡamisan a piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan so~uwaɾ . iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u kiwkaj, saʡiʦəɾ sa ʦiŋra to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, nika maʡo~usi ko~u kaəmaŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina a miɾijas to~u kiwkaj . marariɬ~ɮ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u pasaɬ~ɮak i paris wajfan tintikaj tiɾiɬ~ɮan, pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ɾəkakawa, po~unka no~u iwatan (b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ro~uma kitakit pikiŋkiw to~u no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan so~uwaɾ a ħakasi, aɾatajrajra sa i kiwkaj no~u tinso~ukiw i paiɾasən no~u ko~uħko~uħ miɾiʦaj i ʦb~viŋraan . o~uja a piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u iwatan, maɾakiɾaʦ to~u kasaʦəʦaj simpo~u~u, maŋaʡaj sapinəŋnəŋ miɬ~ɮafo~uʡ, nawħani nai b~b~vaħo~u~uan ko~u piaɾaan, ato~u no~u po~uso~uŋ, nanto~u a kasasitiwtiwan . matija o~uno~u pajɾənkaj ʦi ʦijastə simpo~u~u, o~u iwatan (b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) a so~uwaɾ o~u nai tao~ujin no~u takao~u sakaira . i **** miħəʦa, ira ko~u miɾiʦajaj, ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u o~ujaan to~u * wiɬ~ɮi ko~u pinaŋan no~u ʡo~urip, itira i paiɾasən tinso~ukiwkaj a matəɾaŋaj faɬ~ɮaħo~uŋ, itira mitisiɾ to~u piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan mikawit, miɾiʦaj to~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan to~u saki ʡamis, iwatan a piɬ~ɮafo~uʡan a so~uwaɾ, sa ʦiso~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra, ʦi ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u mato~uʡasaj . i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kiwiko~upo~u pakao~uɾaħ ʦiŋraan to~u mikinkiwan to~u sao~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a paɬ~ɮafo~uħ, ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u pajso~u no~u tajwan ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ pajso~u . to~uja fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maɾaɾisan ʦiŋra saka mino~ukaj tajra i franʦə paisiŋ, saka to~usa miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ pinakaj niŋra tajra i franʦə ko~u pataj . miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u pikəriɬ~ɮ ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin simpo~u~u to~u misa ano~u əʦa pakimaɬ~ɮ i, saħəto~u sa o~uno~u ko~uwapin ko~u sakasaso~uwaɾ, taŋso~uɾ sa patiko~u tajra i saɾo~uŋan ** a kaəmaŋaj a saɾikaka . i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, franʦə ħakasijin o~u franʦə ʦo~uŋko~u po~unka mipakao~uɾaħ to~u kaɾiŋko~u paris wajfan tinto~ukaj, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u aimin, mo~u ɬ~ɮəmiŋ, jo~u~u *o~u~uaŋfa, mo~u~u ɬ~ɮə*o~u~uan, ɾio~u~u jifəŋ, pəi ɬ~ɮə, b~b~vo~u ɾija, pan sħi*o~u~uaŋ simpo~u~uan to~u pikawit to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis, iwatan (b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) finaʦaɬ~ɮan a nikataɬ~ɮamaan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮafo~uʡan to~u so~uwaɾ a mikawit .
